name: harmony-workspace
description: Harnize Harmony — AI 協業前提の業務システム設計ツール (frontend + backend)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: node scripts/check-ports.mjs && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.restart: node scripts/kill-ports.mjs && node scripts/check-ports.mjs && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix frontend run build" "npm --prefix backend run build"
